record.text:
先日Googleフォトの自動補正が実際にはない影などをAI生成するようになったと言ったのですが、その後のアップデートで「補正」と「AI補正」が別物になりました。やっぱり不評だったのか？ :blobcatthink:

ですが相変わらず「補正」でも物の影が勝手に生成される場合があり、自分のニーズとは合わなくなってきたのでアプリを乗り換えることに。 :ablobcatlongleg_bye:

今日からはYouTube動画のサムネイル作りで利用してきたCanvaでスマホ写真を調整しています :blobcatpnd_arti […] 

[Original post on fedibird.com]

images.alt: Googleフォトアプリの編集画面。左に「補正」、右に「AI補正」のボタンがある。

images.alt:
A highly detailed whimsical fantasy sculpture featuring a large glowing white crescent moon with subtle crater texture. A graceful cherry blossom tree with brown gnarled branches and abundant pink sakura flowers grows from the moon, its branches arching beautifully across the crescent. 

At the lower curve of the moon, a cute mermaid with long flowing platinum-blonde hair and closed eyes sits gracefully among stylized swirling turquoise ocean waves. She holds a small glowing pearl in her hands. Delicate transparent bubbles float upwards around her. 

The entire scene rests on a textured rocky base covered in lush green moss, small wildflowers, and tiny plants. Soft magical lighting, sparkles, and gentle bokeh background with blurred green foliage. 

Cinematic, ultra-detailed 3D figurine style, vibrant yet soft pastel color palette, enchanting and dreamy atmosphere, smooth polished surfaces with intricate details.

A highly detailed whimsical fantasy sculpture featuring a large glowing white crescent moon with subtle crater texture. A graceful cherry blossom tree with brown gnarled branches and abundant pink sakura flowers grows from the moon, its branches arching beautifully across the crescent. 

At the lower curve of the moon, a cute mermaid with long flowing platinum-blonde hair and closed eyes sits gracefully among stylized swirling turquoise ocean waves. She holds a small glowing pearl in her hands. Delicate transparent bubbles float upwards around her. 

The entire scene rests on a textured rocky base covered in lush green moss, small wildflowers, and tiny plants. Soft magical lighting, sparkles, and gentle bokeh background with blurred green foliage. 

Cinematic, ultra-detailed 3D figurine style, vibrant yet soft pastel color palette, enchanting and dreamy atmosphere, smooth polished surfaces with intricate details.

images.alt: A non-anthropomorphic, chubby tabby cat sitting upright on a worn couch in a messy, unkempt apartment. The cat is wearing an oversized grey hoodie featuring colorful graffiti-style artwork. It is holding and smoking from a large glass bong, with thick smoke drifting upward around its face. The cat has a relaxed, chill expression with half-closed eyes. The environment is cluttered with details like an unmade bed, scattered cans, ashtray with cigarette butts, and a pizza box on a nearby table. Natural daylight filters in softly through a window, creating a moody, liminal atmosphere. Photographic style, candid composition, highly detailed textures, realistic lighting, shallow depth of field.

images.alt: A highly realistic, candid daytime photograph shows three giant pandas relaxing in a naturalistic zoo enclosure with rocks, logs, bamboo, and soft greenery in the background. On the left, one panda sits eating fresh bamboo with scattered leaves around it; in the center, another reclines on a log watching a small TV on a tree stump displaying a vivid nature documentary of two red pandas in a lush forest; on the right, a third panda lounges against a rock while holding and scrolling on a smartphone. The scene features natural daylight, soft shadows, detailed fur textures and expressions, a slightly humorous yet believable composition, and a DSLR-style look with sharp focus on the pandas and a gently blurred background for depth.
